original_image_tags: stamped box labeled "COMM - FBI", text within the box is faded and illegible.

elements.description: Typed letter on aged paper with multiple administrative markings. Contains typed text addressed to Mr. Hagan Parrish, Sheriff of Polk County, dated February 20, 1957. Includes stamped text 'RECORDED - 54 INDEXED - 54' and a red handwritten number '62-83894-373'. A red stamp reads 'COMM - FBI FEB 27 1957 MAILED 30'. Handwritten annotations include 'Flying SAUCERS' in blue ink and other illegible markings. A list of names appears in the bottom left margin. A note at the bottom mentions a citizen in Richmond, Virginia, and references an aerial phenomena research group.

judge.reason: Both descriptions refer to the same single visual element, a stamped box labeled 'COMM - FBI', with no contradiction on its content.
